properties.name: Karis Critical (Naperville Lucent site)
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Suburban site close to homes; framed within I-88 corridor redevelopment context
properties.community_signals: Months of organized opposition; large public turnout; conditional use permit denied Jan 20, 2026
properties.stressors: Diesel generators, fuel storage and deliveries, noise, air quality, power demand framing, process trust

properties.name: Meta DeKalb Data Center
properties.surroundings_snapshot: South edge of DeKalb near major arterials and industrial growth areas
properties.community_signals: Expansion framed as jobs + investment by City and Meta
properties.stressors: Substation or grid upgrades, water use, backup generators, noise, lighting spill

properties.name: Stream Data Centers Chicago II
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Elk Grove positioned as a data center and connectivity hub
properties.community_signals: Partnerships and utility readiness emphasized
properties.stressors: Grid capacity expansions, generator/mechanical noise, construction impacts if further phases

properties.name: Stream Data Centers Chicago I
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Same regional cluster dynamics as Chicago II
properties.community_signals: Public framing focuses on infrastructure readiness more than community impact
properties.stressors: Cumulative impacts across nearby sites, grid upgrades, noise

properties.name: Equinix CH3
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Part of the Elk Grove data center cluster
properties.community_signals: Appears in industry operations context, not community process
properties.stressors: Grid and redundancy infrastructure, generator testing schedules, noise

properties.name: Digital Realty ORD10 (350 E Cermak)
properties.surroundings_snapshot: South Loop dense urban corridor; historic industrial building repurposed over time
properties.community_signals: Emphasis on interconnection ecosystem and modernization, limited community framing
properties.stressors: Generator testing and emissions, rooftop mechanical noise, construction staging impacts

properties.name: CoreSite CH1
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Downtown Chicago near Board of Trade area
properties.community_signals: Public-facing content is facility capabilities, not community engagement
properties.stressors: Generator testing and emissions permitting, rooftop noise, street impacts from upgrades

properties.name: CoreSite CH2
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Near other major hubs; clustered infrastructure zone
properties.community_signals: Commercial framing; community process not foregrounded
properties.stressors: Generator testing, diesel storage, heat rejection, traffic impacts from construction

properties.name: Edged Project Vector
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Described as south of Meta DeKalb; planned internal roads to Route 23
properties.community_signals: Multiple hearings; significant public turnout and concerns
properties.stressors: Noise, light pollution, stormwater, landscaping, lighting shielding

properties.name: Equinix Minooka project
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Farmland conversion to a large campus concept; village materials include maps and documents
properties.community_signals: Village FAQ published; open house held
properties.stressors: Water allocation concerns, land use shift, industrial footprint impacts

properties.name: Compass Datacenters campus (former Sears HQ)
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Redevelopment of an existing corporate campus footprint
properties.community_signals: Investment scale and ComEd involvement emphasized
properties.stressors: Demolition impacts, long construction timeline, substation and power delivery planning

properties.name: CloudHQ campus (former United Airlines HQ site)
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Borders major arterial roads; village discussions include road and pedestrian upgrades
properties.community_signals: Revisions discussed years after initial approval; ongoing negotiation
properties.stressors: Traffic and road modifications, substation integration, power delivery planning

properties.name: Prime Data Centers Prime ORD campus
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Elk Grove cluster; first building described as three-story with high MW capacity
properties.community_signals: Mostly investment and construction milestone framing
properties.stressors: Substation and grid upgrades, cumulative impacts with neighbors

properties.name: Stream major campus (subdivision annexation area)
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Embedded in or adjacent to residential blocks; land assembly signal
properties.community_signals: Annexation process is a strong signal to track approvals and mitigation promises
properties.stressors: Direct proximity noise and light, construction disturbance, substations mentioned

properties.name: CyrusOne proposed campus (Talkington Township near Waverly)
properties.surroundings_snapshot: Rural farmland; proximity to transmission and nearby solar noted in reporting
properties.community_signals: County hosted hearing, collecting questions and comments; organized opposition reported
properties.stressors: Power draw magnitude, grid implications, water supply and utility planning concerns

properties.name: Centersquare Elk Grove Village Data Center Campus ORD2
